# Konde Design Framework (KDF) Playground

> An interactive playground for the Konde Design Framework (KDF). Edit JSON design tokens and instantly preview beautifully rendered UI components.

KDF Playground allows AI agents and human developers to collaborate on UI design by editing raw JSON configurations that are compiled into Tailwind CSS components.

## Core Pages
- [Playground](https://playground.konde.io/)
- [Konde Studio Homepage](https://konde.io/)

## Developer Resources & Documentation
- [Repository README](https://github.com/KondeIO/konde-io/blob/main/README.md)
- [Technical Docs](https://github.com/KondeIO/konde-io/tree/main/docs)
